Package inventroyManager

Class InventoryManager

java.lang.Object
inventroyManager.InventoryManager
Direct Known Subclasses:
CLIInterface
public class InventoryManager extends Object
This class controls inventory operations, manages BookItem,GroceryItem and ElectronicItem classes inventories and provides CRUD - Create New, Read, Update and Delete - operations.
Since:
Java Inventory Management System 1.0
Version:
1.0 / 12/15/2023
Author:
Uchechukwu Johnfisher Uchem
